ISRCTN43385572.name: TyVAC Nepal
ISRCTN43385572.group: Cluster-RCT in Lalitpur, Nepal; 9 months - 16 years; Vi-TT vs MenA conjugate vaccine; primary blood-culture confirmed typhoid fever

allOutcomes.title: Blood-culture confirmed typhoid at 12 months (primary, IRR; vaccine efficacy 79.0%)

ISRCTN43385572.snippet: Source: Shakya M et al. NEJM 2019;381:2209-2218 (TyVAC Nepal Vi-TT cluster RCT).

ISRCTN11643110.name: TyVAC Bangladesh
ISRCTN11643110.group: Cluster-RCT in Dhaka, Bangladesh; 9 months - <16 years; Vi-TT vs MenA conjugate vaccine; primary blood-culture confirmed typhoid fever

allOutcomes.title: Blood-culture confirmed typhoid at 17.1 months (primary, IRR; vaccine efficacy 85.0%)

ISRCTN11643110.snippet: Source: Qadri F et al. Lancet 2021;398:675-684 (TyVAC Bangladesh Vi-TT cluster RCT).

NCT03299426.name: TyVAC Malawi
NCT03299426.group: Cluster-RCT in Blantyre, Malawi; 9 months - 12 years; Vi-TT vs MenA conjugate vaccine; primary blood-culture confirmed typhoid fever

allOutcomes.title: Blood-culture confirmed typhoid at 18.6 months (primary, IRR; vaccine efficacy 80.7%)

NCT03299426.snippet: Source: Patel PD et al. NEJM 2021;385:1104-1115 (TyVAC Malawi Vi-TT cluster RCT).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 9 Months; max age 12 Years; healthy volunteers: t. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Healthy male or female child between the ages of 9 months and 12 years/364 days at the time of study vaccination.~* A child whose parent or guardian resides primarily within the Ndirande or Zingwangwa study areas at the time of study vaccinations and who intends to be present in the area for the duration of the trial.~* A child whose parent or guardian has voluntarily given informed consent.~Exclusion Criteria:~* History of documented hypersensitivity to any component of t...

title: RapidMeta Infectious Disease | Typhoid Conjugate Vaccine (Vi-TT) in Endemic Settings v1.0
